title: alsophila rubella
intro: Alsophila rubella, also known as the Red Pine Tree Fern or Red Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyathea, which is native to New Zealand. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Alsophila rubella include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
